summary: Store Compliance features backend testing complete (22/22 tests passed). Frontend UI verified via code review - ngrok tunnel instability prevents full E2E testing.

integration_issues.issue: Metro bundler disconnects (error 1006) due to ngrok tunnel instability - infrastructure issue, not code issue

issues: CONSOLE WARNING: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - minor deprecation warning

action_items: Infrastructure: ngrok tunnel instability needs investigation - causes Metro disconnection and 520 errors
Consider adding data-testid='login-submit-button' to Accedi button for better test reliability
critical_code_review_comments: Backend report endpoint correctly validates report_type, prevents self-reporting, and auto-moderates at 5+ reports
Backend block endpoint correctly implements bidirectional blocking and prevents self-blocking
ProfileCompletionBar correctly calculates 4 items (name, photo, skills, first_favor) at 25% each
Reviewer account (reviewer@test.com) correctly identified with mock_qr_scan and mock_gps features
Content moderation in favor creation correctly blocks offensive language and suspicious links
Apple login placeholder shows 'Prossimamente' alert - correct placeholder behavior
ReportModal component has proper data-testid attributes (report-reason-*, submit-report-button)
Frontend index.tsx correctly imports and uses ReportModal, Skeleton, OfflineNotice components

success_rate.frontend: Unable to complete E2E testing due to tunnel instability - code review passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Store Compliance APIs fully tested (report, block/unblock, blocked list, profile-completion, is-reviewer, mock-qr-scan). Frontend login page loads when tunnel is stable - Apple login placeholder visible, email/password form functional. Unable to test post-login features (Report button on favor cards, ProfileCompletionBar) due to Metro disconnection. When tunnel stabilizes: login with skills_test@test.com/test123, verify Report button on favor cards (data-testid='report-favor-*'), navigate to Profile to check ProfileCompletionBar.

frontend_code_review.report_button_on_cards: VERIFIED in index.tsx lines 206-218 with ReportModal
frontend_code_review.profile_completion_bar: VERIFIED imported in profile.tsx line 20, used at line 319

frontend_e2e.post_login_navigation: NOT TESTED due to tunnel issue

infrastructure_issues.ngrok_tunnel: Consistently failing with 'ngrok tunnel took too long to connect' - causes 520 errors
